_comment: PMS capability tiers consumed by scripts/strydeOS_mcp.py get_pms_capability. Tiers: live_booking (full read+write API, Ava can book/reschedule), smart_capture (read-only sync — KPIs + intake, no API write-back), intelligent_triage (reserved — read+write + triage routing), unknown (not wired / stub). Keys are lowercased provider ids. Keep in sync with src/lib/integrations/pms and CLAUDE.md.
